name: inspera/moodle-originality-plugin
description: Inspera Originality Plagiarism plugin for Moodle

sync-moodle: sh -c 'WEBSERVER_CONTAINER=$(docker ps -q -f name=webserver | head -n 1); test -n "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER" || { echo "No webserver container found"; exit 1; }; docker exec "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER" /var/www/html/vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=moodle /var/www/html/plagiarism/inspera'
build-amd-js: echo "🚀 Compiling Javascript with Grunt...remember to run sync-moodle first!"

sh -c 'WEBSERVER_CONTAINER=$(docker ps -q -f name=webserver | head -n 1); test -n "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER" || { echo "No webserver container found"; exit 1; }; docker exec "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER" bash -c "cd /var/www/html && ./node_modules/.bin/grunt amd --plugin=plagiarism_inspera"'
echo "📥 Copying build folder back to local project..."

sh -c 'WEBSERVER_CONTAINER=$(docker ps -q -f name=webserver | head -n 1); test -n "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER" || { echo "No webserver container found"; exit 1; }; docker cp "$WEBSERVER_CONTAINER":/var/www/html/plagiarism/inspera/amd/build ./amd/'
